blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,969 ft. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
